Every module your compound needs. All in one platform.

SYAG's modules work independently or together. Start with the capability that matters most to your compound today — and activate more as your operations grow. All modules are included in every plan. No per-module fees.

Visitor Management

08

Incident Management

From alert to resolution, nothing falls through the cracks.

Explore →

Modules that talk to each other

SYAG modules don't operate in silos. They share a common event and incident pipeline:

A camera detects motion → Flow creates an incident → Guard Management dispatches the nearest guard → Incident is resolved and logged

A visitor overstays their expected departure → Flow sends an alert → Supervisor receives notification → Incident is created

An IoT panic button is pressed → Incident opens immediately → Ops Center operator sees it live → Guard is dispatched

The result: a complete operational picture, not a collection of disconnected tools.

See all modules in action.
